relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Older men are called into dignity, soundness, trust, love, and endurance.
Older women embody reverent conduct and teach what is beautiful.
They train younger women in household love.
The household instruction is held inside witness, not domination.
Younger men are also called to soundness.
Titus himself must become a pattern of beautiful works.
Healthy speech leaves no true ground for harmful accusation.
Ancient enslaved hearers are addressed inside a constrained order.
Faithfulness adorns the teaching of the Savior.
Grace appears, bringing saving/healing to all.
Grace trains the present life into soundness, justice, and reverence.
Hope waits for the appearing of glory in Jesus Messiah.
Messiah releases from lawlessness and forms a people zealous for beautiful works.
These things are spoken with encouragement and correction.

contemplative_note: Titus 2 centers grace as trainer: all groups are called into soundness, justice, reverence, and beautiful works without turning ancient household lines into domination.
